Section.Title: Description
Section.Paragraph: The BindIndexAttributeManualLayout method binds the specified IndexAttribute as a member of the buffer, with a manually defined buffer offset and stride.

Section.Title: Usage
Section.Code: SuccessToken BindIndexAttributeManualLayout(IIndexAttribute& indexAttribute, size_t bufferOffsetInBytes, size_t bufferStrideInBytes);

ArgumentList.ArgumentListEntry: The index attribute to bind to this index buffer.
The byte offset from the start of the buffer to the first index value.
The byte stride between consecutive index values.

SubSection.Title: Return value
SubSection.ReturnValue: True if the operation succeeded, false otherwise. An assertion will be raised in debug builds if the result is not tested.
